title: Smoky Roasted Smashed Peaches Stir-fry
description: This sour, tender, crowd-pleaser Ukrainian dish features peach juice, smoke, and is low-carb-friendly, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: Garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: use the outer peel for extra smokiness

ingredients.name: Balsamic vinegar
ingredients.notes: to balance the acidity of peach juice and sriracha (optional)

instructions: Halve peaches lengthwise, remove pits, and slice into wedges. Smash halves with a fork until slightly soft.
In a small saucepan, heat oil over medium-high heat. Add smashed peach wedges, garlic cloves, smoked paprika, balsamic vinegar (if using), and sriracha (if using).
Stir to combine, scraping bottom of pan for any browned bits. Pour in peach juice.
Simmer for about 10 minutes or until mixture is thickened slightly and peaches are tender. Stir occasionally.

Pour simmered mixture into a baking dish. Top with smashed peaches and continue cooking for an additional 20-30 minutes, or until the top of the mixture is golden brown and the sauce has reduced further.
Serve hot as a side dish or use as a low-carb-friendly stir-fry over steamed vegetables like spinach or zucchini.
